title: Teaching Economics: New Media
further_info: The first part of the course will take place in Moodle. You have flexibility regarding your time. Here is the link to the course: https://moodle.uni-heidelberg.de/course/view.php?id=5014 I will register you. The sessions in room Bergheimer S 58, 4310 / ÜR 00.010 (ÜR) are for discussion and the presentation of your performance record. Please do not hesitate to contact me if these two sessions clash with other courses you are attending.
